_agent_schema_note.description: Schema for each entry in agents[]. Written at end of cycle.

fields.slug: string — use-case-slug matching agents/ folder name
fields.date: ISO date when agent was delivered
fields.gates_passed: array of gate IDs e.g. [G1, G2, G3, G4, G5]

learning.probes_asked: array of strings — Phase F (pre-run) probes asked
learning.gaps: array of strings — concepts that came up weak in Phase F
learning.strengths: array of strings — concepts demonstrated correctly
learning.recall_question_next_cycle: string — weakest gap as a question for next cycle opening

post_run_notes.runtime_surprises: array of strings — things that surprised Ram in the runtime output (Phase F2)
post_run_notes.post_run_probes_asked: array of strings — probes asked during Phase F2
post_run_notes.next_cycle_expectation: string — what Ram predicts the next SDK rung will unlock
post_run_notes.skipped: boolean — true if Phase F2 was skipped without any interaction

_cross_cycle_fields_note.description: Top-level fields written/updated at the end of every cycle (step 8). Used by Phase 0 Session Warm-Up.
_cross_cycle_fields_note.gotchas_mastered: top-level array — cumulative plain-English GOTCHA[] annotations across all agents; appended each cycle, never overwritten
_cross_cycle_fields_note.report_card: top-level object — regenerated each cycle from full agents[]; fields: agents_understood[], sdk_rungs_introduced[], gate_verdicts_summary{}, domain_coverage{}, top_active_gaps[]

candidates.name: Morning Spark
candidates.notes: Recommended for cycle 1 — minimal, clean O-R-A loop, HN API single endpoint

candidates.name: Study Prep Agent
candidates.notes: Locked 2026-06-07 Cycle 1. FORWARD — introduces rungs 1+2. Goal predicate: is_coverage_met(coverage_map). Tools: search_web + fetch_page (mocked). max_iterations=10.

candidates.name: Focus Booster
candidates.notes: G3 weak — environment unchanged between iterations; fix: add probe_log(question) tool so model's question shapes what it observes next
